headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Regions Financial, Raises Price Target to $34
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Brian Foran   maintains Regions Financial (NYSE:RF) with a Hold and raises the price target from $30 to $34.

raw.summary: Truist Securities  analyst Brian Foran   maintains Regions Financial (NYSE:RF) with a Hold and raises the price target from $30 to $34.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on Regions Financial, Raises Price Target to $35
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Dave Rochester   maintains Regions Financial (NYSE:RF) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $34 to $35.
